class.name: QueryResult3D
class.brief_description: Provides the query results with helper functions to get the best positions.

method.name: get_all_node
method.description: Returns all result [Node3D]s within each [QueryItem3D] in ascending order based on score.

method.name: get_all_position
method.description: Returns result [Vector3] position within each [QueryItem3D] in ascending order based on score.

method.name: get_top_random_node
method.description: Returns a random node from the top [param percent] from a range of 0-1.

method.name: get_top_random_position
method.description: Returns a random position from the top [param percent] from a range of 0-1.
